Lyric Poppin Hyun Joon - Come On Baby

Romanization

hwaryeohan neombit chulleongineun
hongdaeyeok georie bamiomyeon

geunyeoneun seksihan momjiseuro

eum eum

ireoge gaseum tteollijiman
naneun mangseoriji aneulgeoya

Come On Baby 
sarangseureon naui yeoiniyeo

Come On Baby

oneul ibameun uriui geot


pingkeubit keoteuni deuriwojin

화려한 네온빛 출렁이는
홍대역 거리에 밤이오면

그녀는 섹시한 몸짓으로
나를향해 손짓하며 다가오네

음 음
사랑하고 싶어
톡쏘는 하이볼 향기처럼

이렇게 가슴 떨리지만
나는 망설이지 않을거야

Come On Come On
Come On Baby

Come On Come On
Come On Baby

오늘 이밤은 우리의 것


핑크빛 커튼이 드리워진

그녀는 나만의 여신처럼
한걸음씩 눈부시게 다가오네

mm

isi.lyrics:
Lyric XAXA - Island

Romanization

We’ve been through the storm of rage
I guess that’s we all made of
Tidal wave float like emotion
Run away from night and dawn

Made without a compass
Our love is satellite
You and I become us
Tandem of the paddle bike

All I want is you
All I want from you is just
hold me tight, down at night
And say star is ain’t too bright as I

Make a way to the bay constantly
Until notice what impulsive mean
Song for me geu daeume cheoncheonhi
neowa na chumeul chwo i seome mudeomdeomhi

Sun is up you hug me
24 you love me
Now we’re lay in on this paradise
But without you
Feel like I’m stranded
In ocean all by my self
You’re ma island and home
And the beaches and shore

As daylight dims
and the shadows fall deep,
The only thing I hold onto
is the warmth of your touch
We softly lay our fears to rest,
wait for the morning
Even if the tides pull us apart,
I'll follow the current
that leads me back home—to you

All I want is you
All I want from you is just
hold me tight, down at night
And say star is ain’t too bright as I

Make a way to the bay constantly
Until notice what impulsive mean
Song for me geu daeume cheoncheonhi
neowa na chumeul chwo i seome mudeomdeomhi

Sun is up you hug me
24 you love me
Now We’re lay in on this paradise
But without you
Feel like I’m stranded
In ocean all by my self
You’re ma island and home
And the beaches and shore

너와 나 춤을 춰 이 섬에 무덤덤히
